comment.body:
Hi Alma, I hope you well. I remember your weekly post on BTC price this summer. 

I attached here a pic :) You stressed the importance of 107.5k as support, from where price bounces few times before making new ATHs this month. (great call)

It is seems now BTC is actually loosing it and retesting 107.5k as resistance. if this is confirmed as a case (especially with window of weakness for tradfi): I was just wondering if you have the same view of a possible flush into 80/90k before possibly going into a final parabolic run up.

Thanks so much

comment.body: It gradually re-opens as companies go through earnings, each company will typically re-open 1-2 trading days after it reports. Late October to early/mid November is typically when it happens.

comment.body:
it was asked some times.
i say "reversion trading" not "mean reversion".
mean reversion is when the price is pinnes... or one can take it as a non-stationary mean, but that would not solve anything.

for a momentum day one must see clean path, wide range, etc. etc
for reversion, tighter range, maybe long fly pattern speed profile, sharp steep resistances from where the spot is expected to revert
comment.raw_body:
